items.title: Visa is quietly building stablecoins into mainstream payment plumbing without you knowing
items.whyYouShouldCare: Visa's integration of stablecoins into payment systems could enhance liquidity and mainstream adoption, potentially benefiting Solana's ecosystem as it supports stablecoin transactions.

items.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collapse of Carrot due to the Drift exploit highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, which could impact investor confidence and liquidity in Solana's DeFi projects.

items.title: HYPE, ASTER falls: Pre-IPO markets change the DEX derivatives game
items.whyYouShouldCare: Changes in pre-IPO markets affecting DEX derivatives may influence trading strategies and liquidity dynamics within Solana's decentralized exchanges.
